_comment: Source of truth for CORRECTED map identity (CLAUDE.md §4.3). Phase-5 `mint` consults `overrides` BEFORE map_infos.json, because RMXP MapInfos editor names can be stale. `overrides` = map id -> {display_name, evidence}; mint reads ONLY this map. `reviewed` records identity questions checked against the wiki that need NO override, so they are not re-litigated. `orphans` = maps with no map_infos entry, pending disposition. `phase7_confirm` = ids to verify in the §9 #3 manual playthrough. Build-agent-maintained; arbitration is spoiler-free (location names / BGM asset / connection topology only). Wiki: https://pokemon-uranium.fandom.com/wiki/

7.evidence: Connects map 76 (Route 04) <-> map 142 (Route 05). Wiki: Comet Cave = the Route 4<->Route 5 dungeon (Burole/Amatree Town -> Rochfale Town). Topology matches the label. The 'PU-Passage Cave' BGM shared across maps 7/10/96 AND 19/36/37 is a reused cave-music asset, not an identity signal. REFUTES the Phase-3 V4 hypothesis (map 7 = Passage Cave), which over-indexed on that shared BGM.

10.evidence: Comet Cave inner floor; connects map 96 + map 142 (Route 05).

96.evidence: Comet Cave inner floor; connects maps 7 and 10.

19.evidence: Hangs off map 31 (Kevlar Town). Wiki: Passage Cave = the Kevlar Town -> Nowtoch City dungeon (the Route 2 rockslide alternative). Label matches topology; same shared cave BGM as Comet Cave.

36.evidence: Passage Cave floor (parent of map 37). Same cave system as map 19.

37.evidence: Passage Cave inner floor (child of map 36).

999.note: Empty 80x80 debug/template map (tileset 6, blank BGM, no events, NO map_infos entry). Recommend WHOLE-MAP STRIP — exclude from Phase-5 mint rather than naming. Disposition is a user fidelity call (§10).
